• Control Rod Bank D is at 155 steps.

Rod Control is in AUTO.

Subsequently at time 0930:

• OHA E-48, ROD BOTTOM, is LIT.

• The crew suspects a dropped rod in control rod Bank D near the outer periphery of the core.

Which ONE of the following completes both statements?

1. The Power Range NIS Channel NEAREST the dropped rod will indicate _(1)_ as compared to the other Power Range Channels.

2. At time 1305, repairs are made and permission to recover the drop rod is authorized. Rod withdrawal restrictions _(2)_ apply.

choices.label: A
choices.html:
_(1)_ higher
_(2)_ will NOT

choices.label: B
choices.html:
_(1)_ higher
_(2)_ will

choices.label: C
choices.html:
_(1)_ lower
_(2)_ will NOT

choices.label: D
choices.html:
_(1)_ lower
_(2)_ will

questions.title: 2022 Q20 — Misaligned Rod Recovery
questions.stemText:
Given:

• Unit 2 is performing a controlled load reduction.

• The following sequence of events occurs:

- OHA E-24, ROD DEV OR SEQ, is LIT.

- The RO reports a group 1 control rod in D bank is at 175 steps.

- The group demand counter is reading 160 steps.

- The crew enters S2.OP-AB.ROD-0001, Immovable/Misaligned Control Rods.

- Control rods are placed in Manual.

- The load reduction is stopped with reactor power at 87%.

Subsequently, the following occurs:

- The misaligned control rod issue has been corrected and is restored to Operations.

- Reactor Engineering approves recovery of the misaligned rod.

In accordance with S2.OP-AB.ROD-0001, which ONE of the following completes the statement?

Prior to recovering the misaligned rod, the operator will place the Lift Coil Disconnect Switches for all rods in the affected bank, except for the misaligned rod, in the _(1)_ position, and then place the Rod Bank Selector Switch to the _(2)_ position.

Note: ON = connected

OFF = disconnected

choices.label: A
choices.html:
_(1)_ ON
_(2)_ SBD

choices.label: B
choices.html:
_(1)_ ON
_(2)_ CBD

choices.label: C
choices.html:
_(1)_ OFF
_(2)_ CBD

choices.label: D
choices.html:
_(1)_ OFF
_(2)_ SBD

questions.title: 2022 Q21 — PZR Reference Leg Leak
questions.stemText:
Given:

- Unit 2 is operating at 100% Power.

- ALL systems are in AUTO.

- A leak develops on the reference leg on the controlling Pressurizer (PZR) Level Channel.

Which ONE of the following completes the statement concerning the effect on Pressurizer Level assuming no operator action?

Indicated PZR Level will be _(1)_ and actual PZR Level will _(2)_.

choices.label: A
choices.html: _(1)_ higher; _(2)_ rise

choices.label: B
choices.html: _(1)_ higher; _(2)_ lower

choices.label: C
choices.html: _(1)_ lower; _(2)_ rise

choices.label: D
choices.html: _(1)_ lower; _(2)_ lower

questions.title: 2022 Q22 — Fuel Handling Incident Alarms
questions.stemText:
Given:

• Unit 2 is in a refueling outage.

• A fuel handling incident occurs in the spent fuel pool from a dropped fuel assembly.

Which of the following describes the expected alarm(s) and/or indication(s) for this event?

1. CAV shifts to ACCIDENT PRESSURIZED Mode

2. 2R5 or 2R9 radiation monitors in Warning or Alarm

3. 2R2 or 2R10A/B radiation monitors in Warning or Alarm

4. BOTH FHB Exhaust Fans running

5. FHB LOW PRESSURE Alarm is LIT

6. FHB HEPA 22 PLUS CHAR is LIT

choices.label: A
choices.html: 1, 3, and 5 Only

choices.label: B
choices.html: 1, 2, and 4 Only

choices.label: C
choices.html: 3, 5, and 6 Only

choices.label: D
choices.html: 2, 4, and 6 Only

questions.title: 2022 Q23 — Plant Vent Rad Monitor Response
questions.stemText:
Given:

- Unit 2 is at 100% Power.

- A release of 21 Waste Gas Decay Tank is in progress in accordance with S2.OP-SO.WG-0008, Discharge of 21 Gas Decay Tank to Plant Vent.

- A Containment Pressure Relief is also in progress in accordance with S2.OP-SO.CBV-0002, Containment Pressure – Vacuum Relief System Operation, due to containment pressure at 0.2 psig.

- The RO reports that the 2R41D, Plant Vent, radiation monitor is in ALARM.

Which ONE of the following describes the plant response?

Note: 2WG41, GDT VENT CONT VLV

         2VC5 and 2VC6, CONT PRESS RELIEF DAMPER

choices.label: A
choices.text: The 2WG41 and the 2VC5 and 2VC6 will automatically close terminating the decay tank release and the pressure relief.
choices.html: The 2WG41 and the 2VC5 and 2VC6 will automatically close terminating the decay tank release and the pressure relief.

choices.label: B
choices.text: The 2WG41 and the 2VC5 and 2VC6 require manual actions to close to terminate the pressure relief and the decay tank release.
choices.html: The 2WG41 and the 2VC5 and 2VC6 require manual actions to close to terminate the pressure relief and the decay tank release.

choices.label: C
choices.text: The 2WG41 will automatically close terminating the decay tank release and the 2VC5 and 2VC6 require manual actions to close to terminate the pressure release.
choices.html: The 2WG41 will automatically close terminating the decay tank release and the 2VC5 and 2VC6 require manual actions to close to terminate the pressure release.

choices.label: D
choices.text: The 2WG41 requires manual action to close to terminate the decay tank release and the 2VC5 and 2VC6 will automatically close to terminate the pressure release.
choices.html: The 2WG41 requires manual action to close to terminate the decay tank release and the 2VC5 and 2VC6 will automatically close to terminate the pressure release.

questions.title: 2022 Q24 — FRCC-1 RCP Start Criteria
questions.stemText:
Given:

- Unit 2 experienced a small break LOCA.

- The crew is implementing 2-EOP-FRCC-1, Response to Inadequate Core Cooling, and is currently attempting to restore core cooling.

- RCS pressure is 1600 psig.

- NO Charging Pumps can be started.

- ALL RCPs have been stopped.

- SG depressurization was NOT effective in restoring core cooling.

- CETs are 1205 °F and rising slowly.

- 21 SG NR level is 10% and all other SG NR levels are 6%.

- Containment pressure is 3.5 psig.

- The crew is performing step 18, RCP START FOR TEMPORARY CORE COOLING.

Which ONE of the following describes how the crew will operate the RCP(s) in accordance with 2-EOP-FRCC-1?

choices.label: A
choices.html: Start ALL RCPs.

choices.label: B
choices.html: Start 21 RCP ONLY.

choices.label: C
choices.text: Do NOT start any RCPs and open one PZR PORV ONLY.
choices.html: Do NOT start any RCPs and open one PZR PORV ONLY.

choices.label: D
choices.text: Do NOT start any RCPs and open BOTH PZR PORVs.
choices.html: Do NOT start any RCPs and open BOTH PZR PORVs.

questions.title: 2022 Q25 — EOP-TRIP-7 Rediagnosis
questions.stemText:
Given:

- Unit 2 has completed all actions in 2-EOP-LOSC-1, Faulted Steam Generator Isolation, to isolate a steam leak on 21 steam generator.

- The crew has just transitioned to 2-EOP-TRIP-3, SI Termination.

- The crew now reports the following plant conditions:

    ○ PZR level is lowering.

    ○ RCS pressure is lowering.

    ○ ALL SG pressures are stable.

    ○ 21 SG WR level is rising.

    ○ 2R19A, SG Blowdown, radiation monitor is in alarm.

- The CRS is unsure of the transition to 2-EOP-TRIP-3 and enters 2-EOP-TRIP-7, Rediagnosis.

In accordance with 2-EOP-TRIP-7, which ONE of the following procedures will the crew transition to NEXT?

choices.label: A
choices.html: 2-EOP-LOCA-1, Loss of Reactor Coolant

choices.label: B
choices.html: 2-EOP-LOSC-1, Faulted Steam Generator Isolation

choices.label: C
choices.html: 2-EOP-TRIP-1, Reactor Trip or Safety Injection

choices.label: D
choices.html: 2-EOP-SGTR-1, Steam Generator Tube Rupture

questions.title: 2022 Q26 — EOP-FRHS-2 AFW Isolation
questions.stemText:
Given:

• Unit 2 is implementing 2-EOP-FRHS-2, Response to Steam Generator Overpressure, due to high pressure in 21 Steam Generator.

• The crew is at Caution step C6-1 that reads "AFW FLOW SHOULD REMAIN ISOLATED TO AFFECTED SG(s) UNTIL A STEAM RELEASE PATH IS ESTABLISHED".

In accordance with 2-EOP-FRHS-2, which ONE of the following is the reason for this step?

choices.label: A
choices.text: Operation of the Turbine Driven AFW Pump at high steam pressure may cause turbine damage.
choices.html: Operation of the Turbine Driven AFW Pump at high steam pressure may cause turbine damage.

choices.label: B
choices.text: AFW is a high pressure system which may cause further overpressure in a SG with no steam release path.
choices.html: AFW is a high pressure system which may cause further overpressure in a SG with no steam release path.

choices.label: C
choices.text: Differential temperatures between the existing high pressure conditions in the SG and the cold AFW will cause tube failure due to thermal stress.
choices.html: Differential temperatures between the existing high pressure conditions in the SG and the cold AFW will cause tube failure due to thermal stress.

choices.label: D
choices.text: AFW pumps would operate near their shutoff head which could result in pump overheating or damage.
choices.html: AFW pumps would operate near their shutoff head which could result in pump overheating or damage.

questions.title: 2022 Q27 — EOP-LOCA-2 RCS Depressurization
questions.stemText:
Given:

• Salem Unit 2 is performing 2-EOP-LOCA-2, Post LOCA Cooldown and Depressurization.

• ALL ECCS Pumps are running.

• 21 Charging Pump was stopped at step 13, Charging Pump Reduction.

• The crew is at step 14, SI Pump Reduction.

• Conditions are met for stopping one Safety Injection (SI) Pump.

In accordance with 2-EOP-LOCA-2, which ONE of the following identifies the SI Pump that should be stopped and the reason for the selection?

choices.label: A
choices.text: 21 SI Pump to reduce the load on the bus for starting additional loads later.
choices.html: 21 SI Pump to reduce the load on the bus for starting additional loads later.

choices.label: B
choices.text: 22 SI Pump to reduce the load on the bus for starting additional loads later.
choices.html: 22 SI Pump to reduce the load on the bus for starting additional loads later.

choices.label: C
choices.text: 22 SI Pump to ensure ECCS injection flow if any single vital bus failure occurs.
choices.html: 22 SI Pump to ensure ECCS injection flow if any single vital bus failure occurs.

choices.label: D
choices.text: 21 SI Pump to ensure ECCS injection flow if any single vital bus failure occurs.
choices.html: 21 SI Pump to ensure ECCS injection flow if any single vital bus failure occurs.

questions.title: 2022 Q28 — RCP #2 Seal Design
questions.stemText: Which ONE of the following is a design feature of the Reactor Coolant Pump #2 seal?

choices.label: A
choices.text: Film riding seal with a design leak-off of 3 gph to the RCP standpipe; allows the RCP to operate indefinitely without restrictions upon a loss of the #1 seal.
choices.html: Film riding seal with a design leak-off of 3 gph to the RCP standpipe; allows the RCP to operate indefinitely without restrictions upon a loss of the #1 seal.

choices.label: B
choices.text: Film riding seal with a design leak-off of 100 cc/hr to the RCP standpipe; serves as only an emergency backup upon a total loss of the #1 seal.
choices.html: Film riding seal with a design leak-off of 100 cc/hr to the RCP standpipe; serves as only an emergency backup upon a total loss of the #1 seal.

choices.label: C
choices.text: Face rubbing seal with a design leak-off of 3 gph to the RCP standpipe; serves as only an emergency backup upon a total loss of the #1 seal.
choices.html: Face rubbing seal with a design leak-off of 3 gph to the RCP standpipe; serves as only an emergency backup upon a total loss of the #1 seal.

choices.label: D
choices.text: Face rubbing seal with a design leak-off of 100 cc/hr to the RCP standpipe; allows the RCP to operate indefinitely without restrictions upon a loss of the #1 seal.
choices.html: Face rubbing seal with a design leak-off of 100 cc/hr to the RCP standpipe; allows the RCP to operate indefinitely without restrictions upon a loss of the #1 seal.

Which ONE of the following completes both statements?

choices.label: A

2) Ensure 2CV21 diverts to VCT

choices.label: B
choices.text:
1) rise
2) Ensure 2CV35 diverts to Hold-up Tanks
choices.html:
1) rise
2) Ensure 2CV35 diverts to Hold-up Tanks

choices.label: C
choices.html:
1) lower
2) Ensure 2CV21 diverts to VCT

choices.label: D

1) lower

choices.html:
1) lower
2) Ensure 2CV35 diverts to Hold-up Tanks

questions.title: 2022 Q30 — CVCS Charging/Letdown
questions.stemText:
Given:

• Salem Unit 2 is at 100% Power.

• The 2CV4, Letdown Orifice Isolation Valve, is in service.

• The crew is transferring CVCS Letdown to the 2CV3, Letdown Orifice Isolation Valve, in accordance with S2.OP-SO.CVC-0001, Charging, Letdown, and Seal Injection.

• 2CV18, Letdown Pressure Control Valve, is in MANUAL.

• 2CC71, Letdown HX Temperature Control Valve, is in AUTO.

• The RO opens 2CV3.

Which ONE of the following describes how the 2CV18 will be adjusted and how the 2CC71 will respond to maintain letdown pressure and temperature within limits?

The 2CV18 will be...

choices.label: A
choices.text: throttled CLOSE as pressure rises and the 2CC71 will modulate OPEN in response to higher temperature.
choices.html: throttled CLOSE as pressure rises and the 2CC71 will modulate OPEN in response to higher temperature.

choices.label: B
choices.text: throttled OPEN as pressure rises and the 2CC71 will modulate OPEN in response to higher temperature.
choices.html: throttled OPEN as pressure rises and the 2CC71 will modulate OPEN in response to higher temperature.

choices.label: C
choices.text: throttled CLOSE as pressure lowers and the 2CC71 will modulate CLOSE in response to lower temperature.
choices.html: throttled CLOSE as pressure lowers and the 2CC71 will modulate CLOSE in response to lower temperature.

choices.label: D
choices.text: throttled OPEN as pressure lowers and the 2CC71 will modulate CLOSE in response to lower temperature.
choices.html: throttled OPEN as pressure lowers and the 2CC71 will modulate CLOSE in response to lower temperature.

questions.title: 2022 Q31 — RHR HX Outlet / Bypass Valve Failure on Loss of VIB
questions.stemText:
Given:

• Salem Unit 2 is in MODE 4.

• 21 RHR loop is in Shutdown Cooling.

• 22 RHR loop is aligned for ECCS injection.

• 21RH18, RHR HX Outlet Valve, and 2RH20, RHR HX Bypass Valve, are being throttled to maintain RHR flow at 3000 gpm.

• A loss of the 2A 115V Vital Instrument Bus occurs.

Which ONE of the following describes the impact to the RHR loop in service and the RCS temperature?

choices.label: A
choices.text: 21RH18 will CLOSE; 2RH20 will remain as-is; RCS temperature will rise.
choices.html: 21RH18 will CLOSE; 2RH20 will remain as-is; RCS temperature will rise.

choices.label: B
choices.text: 21RH18 will CLOSE; 2RH20 will OPEN; RCS temperature will rise.
choices.html: 21RH18 will CLOSE; 2RH20 will OPEN; RCS temperature will rise.

choices.label: C
choices.text: 21RH18 will OPEN; 2RH20 will remain as-is; RCS temperature will lower.
choices.html: 21RH18 will OPEN; 2RH20 will remain as-is; RCS temperature will lower.

choices.label: D
choices.text: 21RH18 will OPEN; 2RH20 will OPEN; RCS temperature will lower.
choices.html: 21RH18 will OPEN; 2RH20 will OPEN; RCS temperature will lower.

questions.title: 2022 Q32 — RHR Pump Trip / Solid Plant Pressure Response
questions.stemText:
Given:

• Salem Unit 2 is in MODE 5.

• Letdown Booster Pump is NOT in service.

• 2CV18, Letdown Pressure Control Valve, is in AUTOMATIC.

Subsequently, the running RHR Pump trips.

Which ONE of the following completes the following statement?

Initially, RCS pressure will _(1)_, and Letdown pressure will _(2)_.

choices.label: A
choices.html: _(1)_ lower; _(2)_ rise

choices.label: B
choices.html: _(1)_ lower; _(2)_ lower

choices.label: C
choices.html: _(1)_ rise; _(2)_ rise

choices.label: D
choices.html: _(1)_ rise; _(2)_ lower

questions.stemText:
Given:

choices.label: A
choices.html: 560 gpm

choices.label: B
choices.html: 1235 gpm

choices.label: C
choices.html: 1910 gpm

questions.title: 2022 Q34 — PRT Rupture Disc / High Pressure Response
questions.stemText:
Given:

• Unit 2 is responding to a Loss of Heat Sink.

• During cycling of the PZR PORVs due to high PZR pressure, 2PR1 failed open.

• The crew closed 2PR6, PZR PORV Block Valve, to isolate the failed open 2PR1.

Subsequently, Console Bezel Alarm, PRT PRESS HI, is now LIT

• PRT Pressure is indicating 12 psig.

Which ONE of the following completes both statements?

1. What would be the impact to the PRT if the PZR PORV could not be isolated?

2. In accordance with the Alarm Response Procedure for "PRT PRESS HI", what action can be performed to reduce PRT pressure?

choices.label: A
choices.text:
1) A rupture disc will rupture at 100 psig.
    2) Drain the PRT to lower level and pressure.
choices.html:
1) A rupture disc will rupture at 100 psig.
    2) Drain the PRT to lower level and pressure.

choices.label: B
choices.text:
1) A relief valve will open at 100 psig.
    2) Drain the PRT to lower level and pressure.
choices.html:
1) A relief valve will open at 100 psig.
    2) Drain the PRT to lower level and pressure.

choices.label: C
choices.text:
1) A rupture disc will rupture at 100 psig.
    2) Open the 2PR15 to vent the PRT.
choices.html:
1) A rupture disc will rupture at 100 psig.
    2) Open the 2PR15 to vent the PRT.

choices.label: D
choices.text:
1) A relief valve will open at 100 psig.
    2) Open the 2PR15 to vent the PRT.
choices.html:
1) A relief valve will open at 100 psig.
    2) Open the 2PR15 to vent the PRT.

_(1)_ 17%
    _(2)_ stop all RCPs, isolate Letdown, and swap Charging pump suction to the RWST

choices.label: B
choices.html:
_(1)_ 17%
    _(2)_ stop all RCPs ONLY

choices.label: C
choices.html:
_(1)_ 5%
    _(2)_ stop all RCPs ONLY

choices.label: D
choices.text:
_(1)_ 5%
    _(2)_ stop all RCPs, isolate Letdown, and swap Charging pump suction to the RWST
choices.html:
_(1)_ 5%
    _(2)_ stop all RCPs, isolate Letdown, and swap Charging pump suction to the RWST

choices.html: Block and reset its associated SEC, then start 21 CS Pump using the keyswitch.

choices.label: D
choices.text: Block and reset its associated SEC, then start 22 CS Pump using the keyswitch.
choices.html: Block and reset its associated SEC, then start 22 CS Pump using the keyswitch.

questions.title: 2022 Q43 — Steam Dump Response to PT-507 Failure
questions.stemText:
Given:

• Unit 2 is at 15% Power with a startup in progress.

• Tavg is 552 °F and stable.

• Steam Dumps are in AUTO MS PRESS control mode set to 980 psig.

• 2PT-507, Steam Header Pressure transmitter, fails LOW.

Which ONE of the following describes how the steam dump system will respond?

The steam dump valves will __(1)__ and the steam generator pressure will IMMEDIATELY __(2)__.

choices.label: A
choices.text:
1) CLOSE
2) LOWER due to the reactor adding less heat to the RCS.
choices.html:
1) CLOSE
2) LOWER due to the reactor adding less heat to the RCS.

choices.label: B
choices.text:
1) CLOSE
2) RISE due to less heat removal from the RCS.
choices.html:
1) CLOSE
2) RISE due to less heat removal from the RCS.

choices.label: C
choices.text:
1) OPEN
2) LOWER due to more heat removal from the RCS.
choices.html:
1) OPEN
2) LOWER due to more heat removal from the RCS.

choices.label: D
choices.text:
1) OPEN
2) RISE due to the reactor adding more heat the RCS.
choices.html:
1) OPEN
2) RISE due to the reactor adding more heat the RCS.

questions.title: 2022 Q44 — Feedwater Isolation on SG Hi-Hi Level
questions.stemText:
Given:

• Unit 2 is at 100% Reactor Power.

Subsequently, the following occurs:

• A malfunction with 21BF19 causes the SG level to rise uncontrollably.

• The reactor automatically trips.

Which ONE of the following describes the expected plant response?

choices.label: A
choices.text: BOTH SGFPs trip and the BF13s, BF19s, and BF40s close.
choices.html: BOTH SGFPs trip and the BF13s, BF19s, and BF40s close.

choices.label: B
choices.text: BOTH SGFPs trip and ONLY the BF19s and BF40s close.
choices.html: BOTH SGFPs trip and ONLY the BF19s and BF40s close.

choices.label: C
choices.text: ONLY the BF19s and BF40s close.
choices.html: ONLY the BF19s and BF40s close.

choices.label: D
choices.text: ONLY the BF13s, BF19s and BF40s close.
choices.html: ONLY the BF13s, BF19s and BF40s close.

questions.title: 2022 Q45 — SG Program Level and BF19 Response
questions.stemText:
Given:

• Unit 2 is at 30% Power and stable.

• ALL Steam Generator Narrow Range levels are 45%.

Based on the above condition, which ONE of the following completes both statements?

1. Steam Generator Narrow Range levels are __(1)__ program setpoint.

2. Assuming SGFP speed remains constant, to return Steam Generator levels to program setpoint, the demand on the BF19's will automatically __(2)__.

choices.label: A
choices.html:
1) above
2) decrease

choices.label: B
choices.html:
1) above
2) increase

choices.label: C
choices.html:
1) below
2) decrease

choices.label: D
choices.html:
1) below
2) increase

questions.title: 2022 Q46 — AFW Pump Runout Protection Circuit Failure
questions.stemText:
Given:

• Unit 2 was at 100% Power when a reactor trip occurred.

• BOTH Motor Driven AFW Pumps are running.

• 21 AFW Pump discharge pressure transmitter (2PA-3450) for the pump runout protection circuit fails to ZERO.

Based on the above condition, which ONE of the following completes both statements?

1. The 21 AFW Pump flow control valves (AF21s) will __(1)__.

2. To regain control of these valves from the control room, the operator will __(2)__ for 21 AFW Pump.

choices.label: A
choices.html:
1) open
2) select LOCAL MANUAL

choices.label: B
choices.html:
1) open
2) depress PRESS OVERRIDE DEFEAT

choices.label: C
choices.html:
1) close
2) depress PRESS OVERRIDE DEFEAT

choices.label: D
choices.html:
1) close
2) select LOCAL MANUAL

questions.title: 2022 Q47 — EDG Response to Loss of Offsite Power During Surveillance
questions.stemText:
Given:

• Unit 2 is at 100% Power.

• 2A Emergency Diesel Generator (EDG) monthly surveillance test is in progress in accordance with S2.OP-ST.DG-0001, 2A Diesel Generator Surveillance Test.

• The 2A EDG is currently running and paralleled to the grid.

• Subsequently, a Loss of Offsite Power occurs.

Which ONE of the following describes the effect on the 2A EDG?

choices.label: A
choices.text: The diesel generator output breaker opens and the diesel remains running; after the bus loads are stripped, the output breaker must be manually closed to allow the load sequencer to sequentially start safeguard loads.
choices.html: The diesel generator output breaker opens and the diesel remains running; after the bus loads are stripped, the output breaker must be manually closed to allow the load sequencer to sequentially start safeguard loads.

choices.label: B
choices.text: The diesel generator output breaker opens and the diesel remains running; after the bus loads are stripped, the output breaker automatically closes and the load sequencer sequentially starts safeguard loads.
choices.html: The diesel generator output breaker opens and the diesel remains running; after the bus loads are stripped, the output breaker automatically closes and the load sequencer sequentially starts safeguard loads.

choices.label: C
choices.text: The diesel generator output breaker remains closed; non safeguards loads are automatically stripped.
choices.html: The diesel generator output breaker remains closed; non safeguards loads are automatically stripped.

choices.label: D
choices.text: The diesel generator output breaker remains closed; non safeguards loads must be manually stripped.
choices.html: The diesel generator output breaker remains closed; non safeguards loads must be manually stripped.

questions.title: 2022 Q48 — Loss of 125 VDC Effect on 4KV Vital Bus
questions.stemText:
Given:

• Unit 2 is at 100% Power.

• 2C 4KV Vital Bus is aligned to 24 SPT (24CSD breaker is closed)

• Subsequently, the following sequence of events occurs:

  - OHA B-18, 2C 125VDC CNTRL BUS VOLT LO, is LIT.

  - 2C 125 VDC bus indicates 0 volts.

  - 24 SPT de-energizes on fault protection.

Based on the above condition, which ONE of the following describes the effect on the 2C 4KV Vital Bus?

choices.label: A
choices.text: Energized from the 2C Emergency Diesel Generator.
choices.html: Energized from the 2C Emergency Diesel Generator.

choices.label: B
choices.text: De-energized with ALL infeed breakers tripped.
choices.html: De-energized with ALL infeed breakers tripped.

choices.label: C
choices.text: Energized from 23 SPT (23CSD breaker is closed).
choices.html: Energized from 23 SPT (23CSD breaker is closed).

choices.label: D
choices.text: De-energized with the infeed breaker 24CSD closed.
choices.html: De-energized with the infeed breaker 24CSD closed.

questions.title: 2022 Q49 — 125 VDC Battery Charger Transfer
questions.stemText:
Given:

• Unit 2 is at 100% Power.

Which ONE of the following completes both statements?

2. The proper sequence for placing the standby charger in service is to __(2)__.

choices.label: A

2) remove 2A1 charger from service, then place 2A2 charger in service
choices.html:

2) remove 2A1 charger from service, then place 2A2 charger in service

choices.label: B
choices.text:
1) 84 ft. Switchgear Room
2) remove 2A1 charger from service, then place 2A2 charger in service
choices.html:
1) 84 ft. Switchgear Room
2) remove 2A1 charger from service, then place 2A2 charger in service

choices.label: C

2) place 2A2 charger in service, then remove 2A1 charger from service
choices.html:

2) place 2A2 charger in service, then remove 2A1 charger from service

choices.label: D
choices.text:
1) 84 ft. Switchgear Room
2) place 2A2 charger in service, then remove 2A1 charger from service
choices.html:
1) 84 ft. Switchgear Room
2) place 2A2 charger in service, then remove 2A1 charger from service

questions.title: 2022 Q50 — EDG Minimum Load After Paralleling
questions.stemText:
Given:

• Unit 1 is at 100% Power.

• The 1A EDG surveillance test is in progress in accordance with S1.OP-ST.DG-0001, 1A Diesel Generator Surveillance Test.

• The operator has just closed the generator output breaker.

• 1A diesel generator output meter (1WM182) indicates 50 KW.

In accordance with S1.OP-ST.DG-0001, which ONE of the following completes both statements?

The operator is required to immediately raise diesel generator load to __(1)__ KW to prevent __(2)__.

choices.label: A

2) excessive accumulation of oil in the exhaust system during low load conditions
choices.html:
1) 250
2) excessive accumulation of oil in the exhaust system during low load conditions

choices.label: B
choices.text:
1) 250
2) tripping the output breaker on reverse power
choices.html:
1) 250
2) tripping the output breaker on reverse power

choices.label: C
choices.text:
1) 500
2) tripping the output breaker on reverse power
choices.html:
1) 500
2) tripping the output breaker on reverse power

choices.label: D
choices.text:
1) 500
2) excessive accumulation of oil in the exhaust system during low load conditions
choices.html:
1) 500
2) excessive accumulation of oil in the exhaust system during low load conditions

questions.title: 2022 Q51 — CAV System Rad Monitor AP Mode
questions.stemText:
Given:

• BOTH Units 1 and 2 are at 100% Power.

• Unit 2 RO reports OHA A-6, RMS HI RAD OR TRBL, is LIT

• The 2R1B-1, Control Room Intake Radiation Monitor Channel 1, is in ALARM.

• BOTH control rooms Control Area Ventilation (CAV) Systems are operating in NORMAL Mode.

Which ONE of the following completes both statements?

1. What is the expected response of the CAV systems?

2. Based on the above condition, how should the control room operators respond in accordance with S2.OP-AR.ZZ-0001, Overhead Annunciators - Window A?

Note: AP = ACCIDENT PRESSURIZE

choices.label: A
choices.text:
1) BOTH Units 1 and 2 CAV systems should be operating in AP Mode.
2) Manually initiate AP Mode from Unit 1.
choices.html:
1) BOTH Units 1 and 2 CAV systems should be operating in AP Mode.
2) Manually initiate AP Mode from Unit 1.

choices.label: B
choices.text:
1) BOTH Units 1 and 2 CAV systems should be operating in AP Mode.
2) Manually initiate AP Mode from Unit 2.
choices.html:
1) BOTH Units 1 and 2 CAV systems should be operating in AP Mode.
2) Manually initiate AP Mode from Unit 2.

choices.label: C
choices.text:
1) ONLY Unit 2 CAV system should be operating in AP Mode.
2) Manually initiate AP Mode from Unit 2.
choices.html:
1) ONLY Unit 2 CAV system should be operating in AP Mode.
2) Manually initiate AP Mode from Unit 2.

choices.label: D
choices.text:
1) ONLY Unit 2 CAV system should be operating in AP Mode.
2) Manually initiate AP Mode from Unit 1.
choices.html:
1) ONLY Unit 2 CAV system should be operating in AP Mode.
2) Manually initiate AP Mode from Unit 1.

questions.title: 2022 Q52 — SW122 CC HX Inlet Valve SEC Response
questions.stemText:
Which ONE of the following identifies when the 21(22)SW122, CC HX Inlet Valves, automatically reposition and why?

The 21(22)SW122 valves...

choices.text: close on a SI signal coincident with a LOOP to ensure SW pump runout does not occur with all CFCUs running.
choices.html: close on a SI signal coincident with a LOOP to ensure SW pump runout does not occur with all CFCUs running.

choices.label: B

choices.label: C
choices.text: fully open on a SI signal to ensure cool CCW is supplied to the RHR HXs and pump seals.
choices.html: fully open on a SI signal to ensure cool CCW is supplied to the RHR HXs and pump seals.

choices.label: D
choices.text: close on a SI signal to ensure SW pump runout does not occur with all CFCUs running.
choices.html: close on a SI signal to ensure SW pump runout does not occur with all CFCUs running.

questions.title: 2022 Q53 — SAC Power Supply & Control Air Pressure
questions.stemText:
Given:

• Both Units are at 100% Power.

• #1 Station Air Compressor (SAC) is running.

• #2 SAC is in AUTO and next to load.

• #3 SAC is C/T for maintenance.

• There is no air usage at either unit's condensate polisher system.

• Control Air headers A and B on both units are indicating 105 psig.

Subsequently, the following occurs;

• Unit 1 reactor trips and the 4KV Group Busses fail to automatically transfer resulting in ALL 4KV Group Busses being de-energized.

• Unit 2 is NOT affected.

15 minutes later, which ONE of the following would be an expected air pressure indication for both control air headers on Units 1 and 2?

choices.label: A
choices.html: 60 psig and lowering rapidly.

choices.label: B
choices.html: 80 psig and lowering slowly.

choices.label: C
choices.html: Stable at approximately 85-88 psig.

choices.label: D
choices.html: Stable at approximately 100 psig.

questions.title: 2022 Q54 — CVCS Letdown Orifice Phase A Isolation
questions.stemText:
Given:

• A reactor trip and Safety Injection are actuated

• PZR level is 25% and stable.

• 1CV2 and 1CV277, Letdown Isolation Valves, are open.

• 1CV3 and 1CV5, Letdown Orifice Isolation Valves, were closed prior to the reactor trip.

• 1CV4, Letdown Orifice Isolation Valve, is open.

• 1CV7, Letdown Containment Isolation Valve, is open.

Which ONE of the following completes the statement?

The 1CV4...

choices.label: A
choices.text: is responding as designed since it is interlocked with the closure of the 1CV2 or 1CV277.
choices.html: is responding as designed since it is interlocked with the closure of the 1CV2 or 1CV277.

choices.label: B
choices.text: is responding as designed since it is interlocked with the closure of the 1CV7.
choices.html: is responding as designed since it is interlocked with the closure of the 1CV7.

choices.label: C
choices.text: has failed open since it receives a signal directly from Safety Injection.
choices.html: has failed open since it receives a signal directly from Safety Injection.

choices.label: D
choices.text: has failed open since it receives a signal directly from Phase A.
choices.html: has failed open since it receives a signal directly from Phase A.

questions.title: 2022 Q55 — CFCU SEC Mode 1 SI Response
questions.stemText:
Given:

• Unit 2 is at 100% Power

• 21, 22, 23, and 24 CFCUs are running in high speed with the 25 CFCU in standby.

Subsequently, a LOCA inside Containment occurs and a Safety Injection (SI) signal actuates.

Which ONE of the following describes the response of the CFCUs following the SI actuation?

choices.label: A
choices.text: 21, 22, 23, and 24 CFCUs start 20 seconds later in low speed, and the 25 CFCU starts immediately in low speed.
choices.html: 21, 22, 23, and 24 CFCUs start 20 seconds later in low speed, and the 25 CFCU starts immediately in low speed.

choices.label: B
choices.text: 21, 22, 23, and 24 CFCUs start immediately in low speed, and the 25 CFCU starts 20 seconds later in low speed.
choices.html: 21, 22, 23, and 24 CFCUs start immediately in low speed, and the 25 CFCU starts 20 seconds later in low speed.

choices.label: C
choices.text: ALL CFCUs will start 20 seconds later in low speed.
choices.html: ALL CFCUs will start 20 seconds later in low speed.

choices.label: D
choices.text: ALL CFCUs start immediately in low speed.
choices.html: ALL CFCUs start immediately in low speed.

choices.html:

choices.label: B
choices.text:
1) has NOT
2) initiate a normal boration IAW S2.OP-SO.CVC-0006, Boron Concentration Control
choices.html:
1) has NOT
2) initiate a normal boration IAW S2.OP-SO.CVC-0006, Boron Concentration Control

choices.label: C
choices.text:
1) has
2) initiate a normal boration IAW S2.OP-SO.CVC-0006, Boron Concentration Control
choices.html:
1) has
2) initiate a normal boration IAW S2.OP-SO.CVC-0006, Boron Concentration Control

choices.label: D
choices.text:
1) has
2) initiate an emergency boration IAW S2.OP-SO.CVC-0008, Rapid Borate
choices.html:
1) has
2) initiate an emergency boration IAW S2.OP-SO.CVC-0008, Rapid Borate

questions.title: 2022 Q57 — IR NIS Channel Failure and P-10 Permissive
questions.stemText:
Given:

• Unit 2 is performing a planned shutdown for a refueling outage.

• Current reactor power is 30%.

• 2N35, Intermediate Range NIS channel fails HIGH.

Which ONE of the following describes the plant impact from this failure?

choices.label: A
choices.text: Reactor trips immediately on 1/2 Intermediate Range channels exceeding the high flux trip.
choices.html: Reactor trips immediately on 1/2 Intermediate Range channels exceeding the high flux trip.

choices.label: B
choices.text: Reactor trips ONLY when 2/2 Intermediate Range channels exceed the high flux trip.
choices.html: Reactor trips ONLY when 2/2 Intermediate Range channels exceed the high flux trip.

choices.label: C
choices.text: Reactor trips when 3/4 Power Range channels are less than the P-10 permissive.
choices.html: Reactor trips when 3/4 Power Range channels are less than the P-10 permissive.

choices.label: D
choices.text: Reactor trips when 2/4 Power Range channels are less than the P-10 permissive.
choices.html: Reactor trips when 2/4 Power Range channels are less than the P-10 permissive.

questions.title: 2022 Q58 — ADFCS Steam Pressure Channel Failure
questions.stemText:
Given:

• Unit 2 is at 100% Power.

• ALL systems are in normal alignment and in AUTO.

• The steam pressure channel associated with the Ovation Digital Feedwater Control System fails HIGH on 21 Steam Generator.

Which ONE of the following describes how the Ovation Digital Feedwater Control System will respond to this failure?

choices.label: A

choices.label: B
choices.html: 21MS10 will OPEN.

choices.label: C
choices.text: ALL MS10's will remain in AUTO.
choices.html: ALL MS10's will remain in AUTO.

choices.label: D
choices.text: ALL MS10s will switch to MANUAL.
choices.html: ALL MS10s will switch to MANUAL.

questions.stemText:
Which ONE of the following completes the statement regarding operation of the Containment Iodine Removal Units (IRUs)?

choices.label: A
choices.text: Lowering SG NR levels. Initiate a rapid load reduction at 15%/min to a maximum power level not to exceed 30%.
choices.html: Lowering SG NR levels. Initiate a rapid load reduction at 15%/min to a maximum power level not to exceed 30%.

choices.label: C
choices.text: Lowering SGFP suction pressure. Initiate a rapid load reduction at 15%/min to a maximum power level not to exceed 30%.
choices.html: Lowering SGFP suction pressure. Initiate a rapid load reduction at 15%/min to a maximum power level not to exceed 30%.

choices.label: D
choices.text: Lowering SGFP suction pressure. Open 21-23 CN108s Polisher Bypass Valves.
choices.html: Lowering SGFP suction pressure. Open 21-23 CN108s Polisher Bypass Valves.

questions.title: 2022 Q66 — Plant Announcement Requirements
questions.stemText: In accordance with OP-AA-104-101, Communications, which ONE of the following evolutions would require a plant announcement?

choices.label: A
choices.text: Swapping a 28 VDC battery charger to the standby charger.
choices.html: Swapping a 28 VDC battery charger to the standby charger.

choices.label: B
choices.text: Commencing a fill of the Main Generator bulk hydrogen bottles from a vendor supply truck.
choices.html: Commencing a fill of the Main Generator bulk hydrogen bottles from a vendor supply truck.

choices.label: C
choices.text: Commencing a Containment Pressure Relief to lower Containment pressure.
choices.html: Commencing a Containment Pressure Relief to lower Containment pressure.

choices.label: D
choices.text: Performing radiography in the Turbine Building.
choices.html: Performing radiography in the Turbine Building.

questions.title: 2022 Q67 — Shift Turnover Restrictions
questions.stemText: In accordance with OP-AA-112-101, Shift Turnover and Relief, a shift turnover SHALL NOT be conducted in which of the following circumstances?

choices.label: A
choices.text: A plant startup is in progress. The generator has just been synched to the grid, and SG level control is in manual.
choices.html: A plant startup is in progress. The generator has just been synched to the grid, and SG level control is in manual.

choices.label: B
choices.text: A reactor startup in progress. SR NIS have indicated 3 doublings since rod withdrawal commenced.
choices.html: A reactor startup in progress. SR NIS have indicated 3 doublings since rod withdrawal commenced.

choices.label: C
choices.text: A diesel surveillance is in progress, diesel is running unloaded.
choices.html: A diesel surveillance is in progress, diesel is running unloaded.

choices.label: D
choices.text: A power ascension is in progress at 10% per hour.
choices.html: A power ascension is in progress at 10% per hour.

questions.title: 2022 Q68 — Confined Space Entry Requirements
questions.stemText:
In accordance with SA-AA-114, Confined Space Program, which ONE of the following completes both statements regarding a PERMITTED confined space entry?

choices.label: B

choices.label: C

2) Fire Brigade

choices.label: D

2) Site Safety Professional

questions.title: 2022 Q69 — OTSC Change to Intent
questions.stemText: In accordance with AD-AA-101-101, Implementing and Technical Procedure On-The-Spot Change (OTSC) Process, which ONE of the following would be considered a change to the INTENT of a procedure?

choices.label: A
choices.text: Altering an Inspection Hold Point in a procedure.
choices.html: Altering an Inspection Hold Point in a procedure.

choices.label: B
choices.text: Increasing the amount or level of management oversight or level of approval.
choices.html: Increasing the amount or level of management oversight or level of approval.

choices.label: C

choices.html: Adding text to clarify the purpose of a procedure step.

choices.label: D

choices.html: Changing an implementing procedure step reference to the correct attachment.

questions.title: 2022 Q70 — Red Blocking Tag Emergency Repositioning
questions.stemText: In an emergency, which position has the authority to authorize the repositioning of a component with a Red Blocking Tag attached?

questions.title: 2022 Q71 — Emergency Exposure Stay Time
questions.stemText:
Given:

• A large break LOCA is in progress and core damage has occurred with high radiation levels in accessible plant areas.

• To prevent further core damage, the Operations Support Center (OSC) is dispatching an NEO to locally operate a failed MOV in an area surveyed at 100 R/hr.

Which ONE of the following is the MAXIMUM stay time (in minutes) for the operator to perform the task without exceeding the authorized planned emergency exposure limit?
questions.questionSource: Modified Bank – Byron 2019 NRC RO72 (October exam)

questions.title: 2022 Q72 — Locked High Radiation Area Posting
questions.stemText:
Given:

• An Equipment Operator is needed to place a Cation Bed Demineralizer in service.

• Radiological readings in the area are 1100 mR/hr.

In accordance with RP-AA-460, Controls for High and Very High Radiation Areas, which ONE of the following completes both statements?

1. The radiological posting requirement for this area is _(1)_.

2. Personnel entering this area will require _(2)_ RP coverage.

choices.label: A
choices.html:
1) High Radiation Area
2) continuous

choices.label: B
choices.html:
1) High Radiation Area
2) periodic

choices.label: C
choices.html:
1) Locked High Radiation Area
2) periodic

choices.label: D
choices.html:
1) Locked High Radiation Area
2) continuous

questions.title: 2022 Q73 — EOP Continuous Caution Definition
questions.stemText:
Given:

• The crew has just entered 2-EOP-FRSM-1, Response to Nuclear Power Generation – ATWS.

• The below Caution symbol appears prior to step 1.

In accordance with OP-SA-108-101-2002, Emergency Operating Procedure User's Guide, which ONE of the following completes the statement?

Because the Caution appears before step 1, the Caution __________________.

choices.label: A
choices.text: provides no instruction or operator action, only information to support the operator action
choices.html: provides no instruction or operator action, only information to support the operator action

choices.label: B
choices.html: applies only to step 1

choices.label: C
choices.text: applies to step 1 and may apply to subsequent procedure steps
choices.html: applies to step 1 and may apply to subsequent procedure steps

choices.label: D
choices.text: informs the operator of an action that must be taken if conditions are met at any time while in the procedure
choices.html: informs the operator of an action that must be taken if conditions are met at any time while in the procedure

questions.title: 2022 Q74 — Emergency Notification Timing
questions.stemText:
Given:

• You are the assigned Primary Communicator.

• At time 1330, the Shift Manager declared an ALERT on Unit 2.

• At time 1335, the Shift Manager completed the Initial Contact Message Form (ICMF) and hands it to you to perform the State and Local notifications.

In accordance with EP-SA-325-F6, Primary Communicator Log, which ONE of the following completes both statements?

1. What time are the notifications to NJ and DE required to be completed by?

2. When does the notification time end?

choices.label: A
choices.text:
1) 1345
2) When the contacted organization is provided ALL information from the ICMF.
choices.html:
1) 1345
2) When the contacted organization is provided ALL information from the ICMF.

choices.label: B
choices.text:
1) 1345
2) When the contacted organization is provided the Emergency Classification Level ONLY.
choices.html:
1) 1345
2) When the contacted organization is provided the Emergency Classification Level ONLY.

choices.label: C
choices.text:
1) 1350
2) When the contacted organization is provided the Emergency Classification Level ONLY.
choices.html:
1) 1350
2) When the contacted organization is provided the Emergency Classification Level ONLY.

choices.label: D
choices.text:
1) 1350
2) When the contacted organization is provided ALL information from the ICMF.
choices.html:
1) 1350
2) When the contacted organization is provided ALL information from the ICMF.

questions.title: 2022 Q75 — Emergency Communications NETS Phone
questions.stemText:
Given:

• An ALERT has been declared on Unit 2.

• You are the Primary Communicator.

• You are directed to perform the State and Local notifications.

Which ONE of the following is the preferred or primary communication method?

Note: NETS – Nuclear Emergency Telecommunications System

NAWAS – North America Warning Alert System (DE only)

EMRAD – Emergency Radio (NJ only)

ESSX-1 – PSEG microwave phone system

choices.label: A
choices.html: Radios (EMRAD and NAWAS)

choices.label: B
choices.html: ESSX-1 phone

choices.label: C
choices.html: NETS phone

choices.label: D
choices.html: Satellite phone

questions.title: 2022 Q76 — EOP-FRSM-1 RCP Trip During ATWS
questions.stemText:
Given:

At time 1000;

• A Reactor Trip First Out annunciator is in alarm with the reactor at power.

• The reactor did NOT trip.

• The crew entered 1-EOP-FRSM-1, Response to Nuclear Power Generation - ATWS.

At time 1010;

• Power Range NIS are indicating 5.2%.

• Intermediate Range Startup Rate is -0.19 DPM.

• OHA D-36, RCP VIB HI, is LIT.

• PO reports 11 RCP motor flange vibration is at 6 mils and stable.

Which ONE of the following completes both statements in accordance with 1-EOP-FRSM-1?

Based on the above conditions, 11 RCP _(1)_ be stopped because _(2)_.

choices.label: A
choices.text:
1. should NOT
2. RCP operation will ensure thorough mixing of boron in the core
choices.html:
1. should NOT
2. RCP operation will ensure thorough mixing of boron in the core

choices.label: B
choices.text:
1. should NOT
2. RCP operation can provide temporary core cooling during voided RCS conditions
choices.html:
1. should NOT
2. RCP operation can provide temporary core cooling during voided RCS conditions

choices.label: C
choices.text:
1. should
2. RCP trip criteria have been met
choices.html:
1. should
2. RCP trip criteria have been met

choices.label: D
choices.text:
1. should
2. the remaining RCPs would provide adequate heat removal
choices.html:
1. should
2. the remaining RCPs would provide adequate heat removal

questions.title: 2022 Q77 — EOP-LOPA-1 MS10 Cooldown Rate
questions.stemText:
Given:

• BOTH Units were at 100% Power when a Loss of Offsite and ALL AC Power occurs.

• Both crews enter EOP-LOPA-1, Loss of All AC Power.

• The RO on Unit 2 reports that the 2A and 2B control air headers are indicating 20 psig and lowering.

• The crew is at step 17.2, ARE SG MS10s (RELIEF VALVES) OPERABLE FROM THE CONTROL ROOM.

Which ONE of the following describes how the CRS will proceed and what is the MAXIMUM cooldown rate?

choices.label: A
choices.text:
1) Manually open MS10s from the control room.
2) 50°F/hr.
choices.html:
1) Manually open MS10s from the control room.
2) 50°F/hr.

choices.label: B
choices.text:
1) Locally open MS10s from the field.
2) 50°F/hr.
choices.html:
1) Locally open MS10s from the field.
2) 50°F/hr.

choices.label: C
choices.text:
1) Manually open MS10s from the control room.
2) 100°F/hr.
choices.html:
1) Manually open MS10s from the control room.
2) 100°F/hr.

choices.label: D
choices.text:
1) Locally open MS10s from the field.
2) 100°F/hr.
choices.html:
1) Locally open MS10s from the field.
2) 100°F/hr.

questions.title: 2022 Q78 — TS 3.9.2.2 Source Range / Gamma-Metrics
questions.stemText:
Given:

• Unit 2 refueling is in progress.

• 2N31 is Operable and selected to the Audio Count Rate Drawer.

• 2N32 is Operable.

• BOTH channels of Gamma-Metrics are out of service for testing.

• Subsequently, a loss of 2A 115V Vital Instrument Bus occurs.

In accordance with Technical Specification, which ONE of the following describes if CORE ALTERATIONS can recommence and the reason why?

choices.label: A
choices.text: YES, when EITHER Gamma-Metric channel is restored to OPERABLE status.
choices.html: YES, when EITHER Gamma-Metric channel is restored to OPERABLE status.

choices.label: B
choices.text: YES, when ONLY both Gamma-Metric channels are restored to OPERABLE status.
choices.html: YES, when ONLY both Gamma-Metric channels are restored to OPERABLE status.

choices.label: C
choices.text: NO, because Gamma-Metric channels are only used for post-accident monitoring.
choices.html: NO, because Gamma-Metric channels are only used for post-accident monitoring.

choices.label: D
choices.text: NO, because Gamma-Metric channels are not backed up by an emergency power source.
choices.html: NO, because Gamma-Metric channels are not backed up by an emergency power source.

questions.title: 2022 Q79 — Loss of Air / TDAFW Pump Overpower
questions.stemText:
Given:

• Unit 2 is at 100% Power.

• 2MS132, 23 AFP TURBINE STEAM INLET VALVE, air supply line ruptures.

Based on the above failure, which ONE of the following completes the statement concerning the status of the Turbine Driven Auxiliary Feed Pump and the actions the crew take to mitigate this event?

1. The Turbine-Driven Auxiliary Feed Pump is _(1)_.

2. The crew will _(2)_.

choices.label: A
choices.text:
1. shutdown
2. ONLY enter TS 3.7.1.2, for INOPERABLE AFW Pump because 23 AFW Pump will not respond to any start signals, and repair the airline within 72 hours.
choices.html:
1. shutdown
2. ONLY enter TS 3.7.1.2, for INOPERABLE AFW Pump because 23 AFW Pump will not respond to any start signals, and repair the airline within 72 hours.

choices.label: B
choices.text:
1. shutdown
2. continue power operations because the TDAFW remains operable due to availability of the opposite train steam supply.
choices.html:
1. shutdown
2. continue power operations because the TDAFW remains operable due to availability of the opposite train steam supply.

choices.label: C
choices.text:
1. running
2. implement S2.OP-AB.CA-0001, Loss of Control Air, Attachment 12, Local Control of SG Pressure and Level, to locally shutdown 23 AFW Pump.
choices.html:
1. running
2. implement S2.OP-AB.CA-0001, Loss of Control Air, Attachment 12, Local Control of SG Pressure and Level, to locally shutdown 23 AFW Pump.

choices.label: D
choices.text:
1. running
2. reduce turbine load using S2.OP-IO.ZZ-0004, Power Operation, until the reactor thermal overpower condition has cleared
choices.html:
1. running
2. reduce turbine load using S2.OP-IO.ZZ-0004, Power Operation, until the reactor thermal overpower condition has cleared

questions.title: 2022 Q80 — EOP-LOCA-5 Containment Spray / FRCE-1
questions.stemText:
Given:

• A LOCA has occurred on Unit 2.

• The crew is performing 2-EOP-LOCA-5, Loss of Emergency Recirculation.

• Containment pressure is now 15.1 psig and rising.

Based on the above condition, which ONE of the following describes how the CRS should direct the operation of the Containment Spray Pumps and why?

The Containment Spray Pumps are operated as directed in...

Note: 2-EOP-FRCE-1 - Response to Excessive Containment Pressure

FRPs - Functional Restoration Procedures

choices.label: A
choices.text: 2-EOP-LOCA-5 since FRPs are NOT implemented during performance of LOCA-5.
choices.html: 2-EOP-LOCA-5 since FRPs are NOT implemented during performance of LOCA-5.

choices.label: B
choices.text: 2-EOP-LOCA-5 because it establishes minimum required Containment Spray flow to conserve RWST inventory.
choices.html: 2-EOP-LOCA-5 because it establishes minimum required Containment Spray flow to conserve RWST inventory.

choices.label: C
choices.text: 2-EOP-FRCE-1 because restoration of the critical safety function takes precedence.
choices.html: 2-EOP-FRCE-1 because restoration of the critical safety function takes precedence.

choices.label: D
choices.text: 2-EOP-FRCE-1 because it uses the same criteria for operating containment spray pumps as LOCA-5.
choices.html: 2-EOP-FRCE-1 because it uses the same criteria for operating containment spray pumps as LOCA-5.

questions.title: 2022 Q81 — EOP-FRHS-1 Heat Sink Established
questions.stemText:
Given:

• Unit 2 reactor tripped.

• During performance of 2-EOP-TRIP-2, Reactor Trip Response, the crew transitions to 2-EOP-FRHS-1, Loss of Secondary Heat Sink, due to Loss of ALL AFW flow.

Subsequently;

• 21 SGFP is running providing feed flow to 22 SG.

• All SG Narrow Range levels are offscale low.

• 22 SG Wide Range level is slowly rising.

Which ONE of the following completes both statements?

1. In accordance with 2-EOP-FRHS-1, operator actions to establish a heat sink _(1)_ complete.

2. Transition back to 2-EOP-TRIP-2 _(2)_ allowed.

choices.label: A
choices.html:
1) are
2) is

choices.label: B
choices.html:
1) are
2) is NOT

choices.label: C
choices.html:
1) are NOT
2) is

choices.label: D
choices.html:
1) are NOT
2) is NOT

questions.title: 2022 Q82 — IR NIS TS 3.3.1.1 During Startup
questions.stemText:
Given:

• Unit 2 is performing a reactor startup per S2.OP-IO.ZZ-0003, Hot Standby to Minimum Load.

• Reactor power is 1E-4%.

Subsequently, the following sequence of events occur;

• OHA E-6, LOSS OF IR, is LIT.

• 2N35, Intermediate Range (IR) NIS Channel, indicates zero on 2CC2.

In accordance with Technical Specifications LCO 3.3.1.1, Reactor Trip System Instrumentation, which ONE of the following identifies the required action, if any?

[REFERENCE PROVIDED]

Note: RTP – Reactor Thermal Power

choices.label: A
choices.text: Immediately suspend the reactor startup and insert all control rods.
choices.html: Immediately suspend the reactor startup and insert all control rods.

choices.label: B
choices.text: Reduce RTP below P-6 OR raise RTP above P-10 within a maximum of 24 hours.
choices.html: Reduce RTP below P-6 OR raise RTP above P-10 within a maximum of 24 hours.

choices.label: C
choices.text: Reduce RTP below P-6 within a maximum of 2 hours.
choices.html: Reduce RTP below P-6 within a maximum of 2 hours.

choices.label: D
choices.text: No action is required since RTP is below P-6.
choices.html: No action is required since RTP is below P-6.

questions.title: 2022 Q83 — LBLOCA Emergency Classification
questions.stemText:
Given:

• Unit 2 reactor tripped due to a LBLOCA.

• RCS pressure is 60 psig.

• Containment pressure is 30 psig and lowering.

• CETs are 720 °F and lowering.

• 2R44A, Containment High Range, Radiation Monitor is indicating 2020 R/hr.

• 2R44B, Containment High Range, Radiation Monitor is indicating 2010 R/hr.

Which ONE of the following is the correct classification and barrier status?

[REFERENCE PROVIDED]

choices.label: A
choices.text: Site Area Emergency; Loss of 2 barriers Only.
choices.html: Site Area Emergency; Loss of 2 barriers Only.

choices.label: B
choices.text: Site Area Emergency; Loss of 1 barrier and Potential Loss of 2nd barrier.
choices.html: Site Area Emergency; Loss of 1 barrier and Potential Loss of 2nd barrier.

choices.label: C
choices.text: General Emergency; Loss of 2 barriers and Potential Loss of 3rd barrier.
choices.html: General Emergency; Loss of 2 barriers and Potential Loss of 3rd barrier.

choices.label: D
choices.html: General Emergency; Loss of 3 barriers.

questions.title: 2022 Q84 — EOP-TRIP-6 Nat Circ Cooldown Without RVLIS
questions.stemText:
Given:

• Unit 2 reactor tripped due to loss of all offsite power.

• The crew has verified natural circulation flow and is cooling down the plant per 2-EOP-TRIP-4, Natural Circulation Cooldown.

• Train A RVLIS is out of service for Maintenance.

• The Shift Manager directs the crew to perform a rapid cooldown and depressurization due to secondary inventory concerns.

Current plant conditions are:

• RCS Pressure is 1840 psig and stable.

• RCS Hot Leg temperatures are 540 °F and lowering.

• 2PT-405 Wide Range RCS Pressure has failed.

Based on the above conditions, what procedure will the CRS implement and what is the MAXIMUM allowable RCS cooldown rate in the procedure entered?
questions.questionSource: Bank – Beaver Valley U2 2015 NRC SRO85

choices.label: A
choices.text: 2-EOP-TRIP-5, Natural Circulation Cooldown with Steam Voids in Vessel (with RVLIS); 100 °F/hr.
choices.html: 2-EOP-TRIP-5, Natural Circulation Cooldown with Steam Voids in Vessel (with RVLIS); 100 °F/hr.

choices.label: B
choices.text: 2-EOP-TRIP-5, Natural Circulation Cooldown with Steam Voids in Vessel (with RVLIS); 50 °F/hr.
choices.html: 2-EOP-TRIP-5, Natural Circulation Cooldown with Steam Voids in Vessel (with RVLIS); 50 °F/hr.

choices.label: C
choices.text: 2-EOP-TRIP-6, Natural Circulation Cooldown with Steam Voids in Vessel (without RVLIS); 50 °F/hr.
choices.html: 2-EOP-TRIP-6, Natural Circulation Cooldown with Steam Voids in Vessel (without RVLIS); 50 °F/hr.

choices.label: D
choices.text: 2-EOP-TRIP-6, Natural Circulation Cooldown with Steam Voids in Vessel (without RVLIS); 100 °F/hr.
choices.html: 2-EOP-TRIP-6, Natural Circulation Cooldown with Steam Voids in Vessel (without RVLIS); 100 °F/hr.

questions.title: 2022 Q85 — CFST Priority / FRTS-1 Thermal Shock
questions.stemText:
Given:

• Unit 2 experienced a reactor trip and safety injection due to a steam line break downstream of the Main Steam Line Isolation Valves (MSIVs).

• ALL MSIVs failed to close.

• The crew is performing SI Termination steps per 2-EOP-LOSC-2, Uncontrolled Depressurization of All Steam Generators.

• Field operator reports that 23MS167 is now closed.

Subsequently, the STA observes the following;

• AFW flow to each SG is 1E+4 lbm/hr.

• All SG NR Levels are off-scale low.

• 21, 22, and 24 SG Pressures are 100 psig.

• 23 SG Pressure is 200 psig and rising.

• RCS Pressure is 1100 psig.

• ALL RCS T-Colds temperatures are < 230 °F.

• Intermediate Range SUR is +0.1 DPM.

Which ONE of the following describes the NEXT CRS action?

choices.label: A
choices.text: Return to 2-EOP-LOSC-1, Faulted Steam Generator Isolation.
choices.html: Return to 2-EOP-LOSC-1, Faulted Steam Generator Isolation.

choices.label: B
choices.text: Transition to 2-EOP-FRSM-1, Response to Nuclear Generation.
choices.html: Transition to 2-EOP-FRSM-1, Response to Nuclear Generation.

choices.label: C
choices.text: Transition to 2-EOP-FRHS-5, Response to Steam Generator Low Level.
choices.html: Transition to 2-EOP-FRHS-5, Response to Steam Generator Low Level.

choices.label: D
choices.text: Transition to 2-EOP-FRTS-1, Response to Thermal Shock.
choices.html: Transition to 2-EOP-FRTS-1, Response to Thermal Shock.

questions.title: 2022 Q86 — RCP Seal Failure AB.RCP Actions
questions.stemText:
Given:

• Unit 2 is at 100% Power.

• The RO reports the following for 21 RCP:

  - Console Alarm, SEAL LEAK-OFF FLOW HI-LO, is LIT.

  - Seal Leak-off recorder indicates > 6 gpm.

  - Seal Injection Flow indicates 8.5 gpm.

  - Seal Inlet and Outlet Temperatures are indicating 109°F and rising.

• The crew enters S2.OP-AB.RCP-0001, Reactor Coolant Pump Abnormality.

Which ONE of the following completes both statements?

1. Which RCP seal failed?

2. In accordance with S2.OP-AB.RCP-0001, what actions will the CRS direct the crew?

choices.label: A
choices.text:
1) #1
2) Immediately TRIP the reactor and stop 21 RCP.
choices.html:
1) #1
2) Immediately TRIP the reactor and stop 21 RCP.

choices.label: B
choices.text:
1) #1
2) Perform an orderly shutdown and stop 21 RCP within 8 hours.
choices.html:
1) #1
2) Perform an orderly shutdown and stop 21 RCP within 8 hours.

choices.label: C
choices.text:
1) #2
2) Immediately TRIP the reactor and stop 21 RCP.
choices.html:
1) #2
2) Immediately TRIP the reactor and stop 21 RCP.

choices.label: D
choices.text:
1) #2
2) Perform an orderly shutdown and stop 21 RCP within 8 hours.
choices.html:
1) #2
2) Perform an orderly shutdown and stop 21 RCP within 8 hours.

questions.title: 2022 Q87 — NRC Reporting Manual Trip & SI
questions.stemText:
Given:

• In accordance with the outage schedule, the Unit 2 reactor was manually tripped at 20% power for the start of a planned refueling outage.

• Following the reactor trip, the crew observes RCS pressure dropping rapidly and manually actuates Safety Injection.

• All other systems responded as designed post trip.

Based on the above events, which ONE of the following correctly identifies the reportability to the NRC?

[REFERENCE PROVIDED]

choices.label: A
choices.html: Nonreportable.

choices.label: B
choices.html: 4 hour report under RAL#s 11.3.1 AND 11.3.2.

choices.label: C
choices.html: 4 hour report under RAL# 11.3.2 ONLY.

choices.label: D
choices.html: 4 hour report under RAL# 11.3.1 ONLY.

questions.title: 2022 Q88 — Loss of Control Air PZR Level
questions.stemText:
Given:

• Unit 1 is at 100% Power.

• 11 Charging Pump is in service.

• A Loss of All Control Air has occurred.

• The crew enters S1.OP-AB.CA-0001, Loss of Control Air.

• The CRS directs manually tripping the reactor and entering 1-EOP-TRIP-1, Reactor Trip or Safety Injection.

• Operators are locally controlling AFW valves to maintain post trip SG Narrow Range levels.

Which ONE of the following completes both statements?

1. What will be the subsequent impact on PZR level?

2. What is the preferred course of action?

choices.label: A
choices.text:
1) PZR level will rise
2) Locally control charging flow by adjusting the 1CV54, CENT CHG PUMP FLOW CONT VLV.
choices.html:
1) PZR level will rise
2) Locally control charging flow by adjusting the 1CV54, CENT CHG PUMP FLOW CONT VLV.

choices.label: B
choices.text:
1) PZR level will rise
2) Transfer to 13 Charging Pump and locally control the speed changer.
choices.html:
1) PZR level will rise
2) Transfer to 13 Charging Pump and locally control the speed changer.

choices.label: C
choices.text:
1) PZR level will lower
2) Transfer to 13 Charging Pump and locally control the speed changer.
choices.html:
1) PZR level will lower
2) Transfer to 13 Charging Pump and locally control the speed changer.

choices.label: D
choices.text:
1) PZR level will lower
2) Locally control charging flow by adjusting the 1CV54, CENT CHG PUMP FLOW CONT VLV.
choices.html:
1) PZR level will lower
2) Locally control charging flow by adjusting the 1CV54, CENT CHG PUMP FLOW CONT VLV.

questions.title: 2022 Q89 — EDG Common Mode Failure TS 3.8.1.1
questions.stemText:
Given:

• Unit 1 is at 100% power.

• During the performance of the 1A Emergency Diesel Generator (EDG) surveillance run, the 1A EDG failed to start.

• The 1A EDG was declared INOPERABLE today (Monday) at 0600.

• Troubleshooting determined that the K1C relay in the diesel start circuit failed to actuate.

• The 1B and 1C EDGs have these same relay models installed.

In accordance with Technical Specification, which ONE of the following is the required action(s)?

[REFERENCE PROVIDED]

choices.label: A
choices.text: Restore the 1A EDG to OPERABLE status by 0600 Thursday ONLY.
choices.html: Restore the 1A EDG to OPERABLE status by 0600 Thursday ONLY.

choices.label: B
choices.text: Perform an operability run on the 1B and 1C EDGs by 0600 Tuesday AND restore 1A EDG by 0600 Thursday.
choices.html: Perform an operability run on the 1B and 1C EDGs by 0600 Tuesday AND restore 1A EDG by 0600 Thursday.

choices.label: C
choices.text: The unit must be in at least HOT STANDBY by 1300 today.
choices.html: The unit must be in at least HOT STANDBY by 1300 today.

choices.label: D
choices.text: Restore two of the inoperable EDGs to OPERABLE status by 0800 today AND restore the remaining inoperable EDG by 0600 Thursday.
choices.html: Restore two of the inoperable EDGs to OPERABLE status by 0800 today AND restore the remaining inoperable EDG by 0600 Thursday.

questions.title: 2022 Q90 — Loss of All SW Bus Lockout
questions.stemText:
Given:

• Unit 2 is at 40% Power.

• #4 SW Bay was isolated due to a leak.

• 2A EDG is paralleled to the 4KV bus for surveillance testing.

• 22 Charging Pump is in service.

• 21 and 23 SW Pumps are in service.

• 22 SW Pump is in AUTO and standby.

Subsequently, the following occurs:

• 23 SW Pump trips.

• OHA J-1, 2A 4KV VTL BUS DIFF PROT, is LIT

Based on the above conditions, which ONE of the following completes both statements?

1. What is the effect on the SW system?

2. How will the CRS proceed?

Note: S2.OP-AB.SW-0001 — Loss of Service Water Header Pressure

        S2.OP-AB.SW-0005 — Loss of All Service Water

choices.label: A
choices.text:
1) 22 SW Pump will auto start on low SW header pressure.
2) Enter S2.OP-AB.SW-0001, reduces loads on the SW system listed on Attachment 2, Loads Affected by a Loss of Service Water.
choices.html:
1) 22 SW Pump will auto start on low SW header pressure.
2) Enter S2.OP-AB.SW-0001, reduces loads on the SW system listed on Attachment 2, Loads Affected by a Loss of Service Water.

choices.label: B
choices.text:
1) 22 SW Pump will auto start on low SW header pressure.
2) Enter S2.OP-AB.SW-0001, place 23 Charging Pump in service and remove 22 Charging Pump from service.
choices.html:
1) 22 SW Pump will auto start on low SW header pressure.
2) Enter S2.OP-AB.SW-0001, place 23 Charging Pump in service and remove 22 Charging Pump from service.

choices.label: C
choices.text:
1) All SW flow capability is lost.
2) Enters S2.OP-AB.SW-0005, then trips the reactor and stops the RCPs to limit the heat input to the CCW system.
choices.html:
1) All SW flow capability is lost.
2) Enters S2.OP-AB.SW-0005, then trips the reactor and stops the RCPs to limit the heat input to the CCW system.

choices.label: D
choices.text:
1) All SW flow capability is lost.
2) Enters S2.OP-AB.SW-0005, then trips the Main Turbine and reduces reactor power to < 5% to lower heat input into the RCS.
choices.html:
1) All SW flow capability is lost.
2) Enters S2.OP-AB.SW-0005, then trips the Main Turbine and reduces reactor power to < 5% to lower heat input into the RCS.

questions.title: 2022 Q91 — TS POPS Inoperable MODE 4 Entry
questions.stemText:

In accordance with Technical Specification 3.4.10.3, Overpressure Protection Systems, which ONE of the following statements is correct regarding MODE 4 entry?

[REFERENCE PROVIDED]

choices.label: A
choices.text: Mode change can be made. The channel must be restored to OPERABLE status within 7 days following the mode change.
choices.html: Mode change can be made. The channel must be restored to OPERABLE status within 7 days following the mode change.

choices.label: B
choices.text: Mode change can be made after a risk assessment is performed.
choices.html: Mode change can be made after a risk assessment is performed.

choices.label: C
choices.text: Mode change can be made. The channel must be restored to OPERABLE status within 24 hours following the mode change.
choices.html: Mode change can be made. The channel must be restored to OPERABLE status within 24 hours following the mode change.

choices.label: D
choices.text: Mode change can NOT be made until the channel is OPERABLE.
choices.html: Mode change can NOT be made until the channel is OPERABLE.

questions.title: 2022 Q92 — Misaligned Rod Power Reduction
questions.stemText:
Given:

• Unit 2 is at 100% Power.

• Rod Control Exercise Testing is in progress per S2.OP-ST.RCS-0001, Reactivity Control System Rod Control Assemblies.

• After withdrawing Control Bank C rods to the ARO position, the RO reports the following;

    - Group Demand Counter for Control Bank C indicates 230 steps.

    - ARPI indication on P-250 indicates one Control Bank C rod at 215 steps.

• The crew enters S2.OP-AB.ROD-0001, Immoveable/Misaligned Control Rods.

• Reactor Engineering confirms the misaligned rod.

Which ONE of the following describes the required action per S2.OP-AB.ROD-0001?

choices.label: A
choices.text: Insert Control Bank C to 215 steps to realign the bank to the misaligned control rod.
choices.html: Insert Control Bank C to 215 steps to realign the bank to the misaligned control rod.

choices.label: B
choices.text: Reduce power to less than 75% Rated Thermal Power.
choices.html: Reduce power to less than 75% Rated Thermal Power.

choices.label: C
choices.text: Place the unit in HOT STANDBY within 6 hours.
choices.html: Place the unit in HOT STANDBY within 6 hours.

choices.label: D
choices.text: Power operation at 100% may continue, provided shutdown margin is satisfied.
choices.html: Power operation at 100% may continue, provided shutdown margin is satisfied.

questions.title: 2023 Q1 — RCS Low Flow / P-7 and P-8 Logic
questions.stemText:
Given:

• Salem Unit 2 is at 25% reactor power.

• The RO reports the following flow indications on 21 RC loop:

  - Channel 1 - 89%

  - Channel 2 - 89%

  - Channel 3 - 92%

Which of the following describes the expected response?

choices.label: A
choices.text: Per the Alarm Response Procedure, manually trip the reactor, stop 21 RCP, and enter 2-EOP-TRIP-1, Reactor Trip or Safety Injection.
choices.html: Per the Alarm Response Procedure, manually trip the reactor, stop 21 RCP, and enter 2-EOP-TRIP-1, Reactor Trip or Safety Injection.

choices.label: B
choices.text: RC flows are degraded but above the RPS setpoint for low RCS flow; power operation may continue.
choices.html: RC flows are degraded but above the RPS setpoint for low RCS flow; power operation may continue.

choices.label: C
choices.text: Automatic reactor trip based on 2/3 low flow channels on one RC loop with power greater than P-7; perform immediate actions per 2-EOP-TRIP-1, Reactor Trip or Safety Injection.
choices.html: Automatic reactor trip based on 2/3 low flow channels on one RC loop with power greater than P-7; perform immediate actions per 2-EOP-TRIP-1, Reactor Trip or Safety Injection.

choices.label: D
choices.text: Automatic reactor trip based on 1/3 low flow channels on one RC loop with power greater than P-7; perform immediate actions per 2-EOP-TRIP-1, Reactor Trip or Safety Injection.
choices.html: Automatic reactor trip based on 1/3 low flow channels on one RC loop with power greater than P-7; perform immediate actions per 2-EOP-TRIP-1, Reactor Trip or Safety Injection.
